name: Mariamne, the True Dracophoenix
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>凰</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マリアムネ
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 2 other monsters in your hand and/or face-up on your field, including a WIND monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, and if you do that, and both destroyed monsters were WIND, you can also banish exactly 4 cards from the top of your opponent's Deck. If this card is destroyed by card effect: You can add 1 non-WIND Wyrm monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mariamne, the True Dracophoenix" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 2 other monsters in your hand and/or face-up on your field, including a WIND monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, and if you do that, and both destroyed monsters were WIND, you can also banish exactly 4 cards from the top of your opponent's Deck. If this card is destroyed by card effect: You can add 1 non-WIND Wyrm monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mariamne, the True Dracophoenix" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can destroy 2 other monsters in your hand and/or face-up on your field, including a WIND monster, and if you do, Special Summon this card, and if you do that, and both destroyed monsters were WIND, you can also banish exactly 4 cards from the top of your opponent's Deck. If this card is destroyed by card effect: You can add 1 non-WIND Wyrm monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mariamne, the True Dracophoenix" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
